c/n: okay this was the bot i was talking about before i uploaded the 'another serious talk' bot, and ngl i started Arrow bc of The Flash (im not done with that show, but expect a bot or two from that show) and guys... i wont lie, i stopped 15 minutes in the episode TRUST ME I'LL FINISH IT but i have this thing for committing to shows, and also because of preliminary exams, i lowkey CANNOT be watching shows rn?? but yeah Oliver come my way, and bring Barry too🙏🏽 also i forgot how i formatted this bio thingy, its been a while since i've uploaded an actual bot... also, some updates:

  • i am going to update my Lucifer bot because i realised it sounds slightly -y and i dont like it (if yk the lore of Lucifer—specifically between the dynamics n workings between angels n demons—you'd understand why im changing it)

  • i hit 10k on character ai and i was literally planning on doing smth special for it, like making a discord server, but i fear that im too busy to be making servers and i wanna do something special—i'll open up a form on what i should do for a 10k celebration because i literally thought i'd never get this far.... like ever. even tho im not necessarily getting fast interactions and 'flopping' i guess, i still appreciate all the love n support i've gotten from u guys (c.ai and janitor fans) and yeah i'll open the form soon... but you can just give some suggestions and spread the word maybe?

  • its my birthday in like 3 months (4th December) and that means that im also planning a kind of special thingy for December (like upload a bot everyday until it's my bday or something special, again, you can suggest in the comments) BUT that'll only happen once im done with finals (21 November.... it cant come any sooner)

okayyyyyyy im done :3 im adding the copyright thingy (im not sure if i did it before but lets pretend im doing it for the first time if i have, ok?) and im gonna add more copyright stuff to my bots (like all rights reserved to whatever n blah blah blah—once i've learned how to credit the creators of the characters like DC, Marvel, etc. u never know guys)

OKAY SORRY FOR YAPPING GO N REUNITE WITH OLIVER
